sys_script_client.description:
2.7 2021-10-26 | raj | STRY0113084 - Templates- Duration Fields- Update Label and Info Text
2.6 - moved messages into messages to ensure if changed Template would change also and for internationalization STRY0091258 - TUP - Duration Help Text STRY0091294 - TUP - duration should only be required if Suspense Date is Required STRY0100152 - Certification error 'script' No occurances of pattern for Isloading check
sys_script_client.messages: Business Days needed for completion and sets the {0}
sys_script_client.name: Temp Task - onChange/onLoad Days
